title: Biome Golems x Fresh Animations
description: An addon for Fresh Animations that adds compatibility to Biome Golems
body: Adds compatibility between the [Biome Golems]([https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-golems](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-golems)) Mod and the [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) Resource Pack.
